texto: Assembled in Gaza from Brazilian bioplastics, Turkish and Indonesian electronics, running Egyptian software and catching its time cues from an Israeli satellite, it commented on the world in ways its producers had failed to con
explicacao: Citação de Alex Jeffers sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Assembled in Gaza from Brazilian bioplastics, Turkish and Indonesian electronics, running Egyptia…” articula tempo, salvation, time em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como time.
